videos.headline: Jalen Berger charges into end zone for UCLA TD
videos.description: Jalen Berger hauls in a pass from Ethan Garbers and powers into the end zone for a UCLA touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jalen Berger charges into end zone for UCLA TD) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dante Dowell bulldozes into end zone to cut UCLA lead
videos.description: Dante Dowell powers across the goal line for Nebraska's first touchdown, chipping away at UCLA's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dante Dowell bulldozes into end zone to cut UCLA lead) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ethan Garbers goes off on 57-yard rush
videos.description: Ethan Garbers sprints 57 yards on a big play for UCLA.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ethan Garbers goes off on 57-yard rush) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kain Medrano hurdles on his way to a 38-yard pick-six TD for UCLA
videos.description: Kain Medrano snags the interception and hurdles over a Cornhusker defender, returning it 38 yards for a UCLA touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kain Medrano hurdles on his way to a 38-yard pick-six TD for UCLA) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kwazi Gilmer snags 48-yard TD for UCLA
videos.description: Kwazi Gilmer hauls in a 48-yard pass from Ethan Garbers for another UCLA touchdown, extending the lead over Nebraska to 27-7.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kwazi Gilmer snags 48-yard TD for UCLA) 2024/11/02 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Dante Dowdell scores 1-yard rushing touchdown) 2024/11/02 ESHEET
